'''Talon Squadron''' was an elite heavy strike/[[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] support [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]], consisting of [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]] and [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE Avengers]]. It was stationed aboard the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Rage (Imperial-class)|''Rage'']].

==Characteristics==
Talon Squadron originally consisted of two squadrons—[[Beta Squadron/Legends|Beta Squadron]] and [[Gamma Squadron/Legends|Gamma Squadron]]—equipped with [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] and [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]]. During the [[Airam sector/Legends|Airam Sector]] campaign, they were merged after the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial-class Star Destroyer]] [[Rage (Imperial-class)|''Rage'']] of [[Task Force Vengeance]] received a shipment of advanced [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE Avenger]] and [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboat]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]], replacing her stock TIE/LN fighters and [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/IN interceptors]], and TIE/sa bombers. [[Avenger Squadron]] received the space superiority TIE's, while Avenger's former support squadrons, Beta and Gamma, were reformed into Talon Squadron and flew [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]] almost exclusively. The squadron often worked in tandem with [[Avenger Squadron]] and, during such operations, it played a vital role as part of Task Force Vengeance. Towards the end of the campaign—in the [[Battle of Nocto]]—it was re-equipped with TIE Avengers.

==History==
During the operations of Task Force Vengeance under [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Wooyou Senn|Senn]], Talon Squadron's duties primarily involved heavy strike missions against enemy [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]], disabling target vessels with [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannons]] and the support of Avenger Squadron during combat.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]''
